title: <div>   * Status: (Dropdown: &quotPending,&quot &quotIn Progress,&quot &quotFulf
content:
* Status: (Dropdown: "Pending," "In Progress," "Fulfilled," "Canceled")
* Assigned To: (Name of person responsible for procurement)
* Notes/Confirmation: (Text field for any specific details about the fulfillment)
Phase 2: Daily Workflow & Preparation
System 3: Daily Check-in/Check-out Process
Goal: Proactive problem-solving, identify needs for the next day, and reduce reactive emergency runs.
Tools: This can leverage the group chat and the shared notes system.
A. End-of-Day Check-out (For Employees)
Purpose: To inform management of progress, identify obstacles, and request resources for the next day's work.
* Timing: Last 15-30 minutes of the workday, before leaving the job site.
* Method:
* Group Chat (Quick Update - for all to see current status): Each lead technician/foreman posts a brief update in a designated #Daily-Job-Updates or #End-of-Day-Checkouts channel.
* Format:
* Job Name: [Job Name]
* Progress Today: [Brief bullet points on what was accomplished]
context: From document: OK, I have been taken in to my father‘s company, Majestic design. It’s… — chunk 19 (chunk 19/22)
